; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"big\00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [7 x i8] c"medium\00", align 1
@.str.2 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"small\00", align 1
@.str.3 = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"done\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %merge_5 = alloca void
  %merge_11 = alloca void
  %t0 = add i32 0, 5
  %t1 = add i32 0, 10
  %t2 = icmp sgt i32 %t0, %t1
  br i1 %t2, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  call i32 @puts(ptr @.str.0)
  br label %bb3
bb2:
  %t4 = add i32 0, 3
  %t5 = icmp sgt i32 %t0, %t4
  br i1 %t5, label %bb4, label %bb5
bb3:
  call i32 @puts(ptr @.str.3)
  ret i32 0
bb4:
  call i32 @puts(ptr @.str.1)
  br label %bb6
bb5:
  call i32 @puts(ptr @.str.2)
  br label %bb6
bb6:
  br label %bb3
}
